global.description: The ad features a bright yellow background with a central focus on a 2-for-1 offer.
global.main_message: Promoting a 2-for-1 offer with free delivery.

elements.label: Solid yellow background
elements.description: A bright solid yellow background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and cheerful base for the ad.

elements.label: CraveLoop logo
elements.description: The logo features the word 'CraveLoop' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Three empty product slots
elements.description: Three rectangular slots with a glass-like appearance, suggesting a product display, are centered in the ad.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small rectangular badge with the word 'SALE' in bold letters, located at the top right corner.

elements.label: 2-for-1 offer text
elements.description: The text '2-for-1 tonight' is prominently displayed in a large, bold font, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Free delivery text
elements.description: The text 'Free delivery over $15' is smaller and positioned below the main offer, in a clear, readable font.

elements.label: Order now button
elements.description: A button with the text 'Order now' in a bold font, located at the bottom of the ad, inviting immediate action.

elements.label: Circular indicator
elements.description: A small circular indicator is placed to the left of the product slots, adding a decorative touch.

elements.label: Additional circular element
elements.description: A smaller circular element positioned below the first, possibly indicating a selection or option.

elements.label: Main content area
elements.description: The central area of the ad contains the main offer and product slots, visually drawing attention.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The headline 'CraveLoop' is prominently displayed at the top, establishing brand identity.

elements.label: Order now text
elements.description: The text 'Order now' is clear and inviting, encouraging users to take action.

elements.label: SALE text
elements.description: The word 'SALE' is bold and eye-catching, indicating a promotional offer.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and cheerful, 2-for-1 offer, free delivery
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main offer is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: 2-for-1 tonight, Free delivery over $15, CraveLoop, Order now, SALE
